no_changes_rationale:
verification_command: cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... && lefthook run pre-commit
reason: The requested routing is already implemented in the current tree. cli/internal/agent/try/attempt.go owns the declined_needs_decomposition, push_failed, and push_conflict parking outcomes via structured Outcome/ParkingOutcome data; cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go consumes attemptOut.Parking generically and no longer classifies those statuses inline; and the acceptance tests named in the bead already exist in cli/internal/agent/try/attempt_test.go and cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_push_failed_test.go.
